donations package

Subpackages

  • donations.migrations package
    • Submodules

Submodules

donations.admin module

Django admin configuration for the donations application.

Registers models in the admin interface to allow staff users to view and manage payment records.

donations.models module

class donations.models.Payment(*args, **kwargs)

Bases: Model

Represents a donation or payment transaction within the system.

This model stores Stripe transaction details, links the payment to a specific fundraising announcement, and tracks its completion status.

announcement

Reference to the related fundraising announcement.

user

The user who made the payment. Can be null for anonymous donations.

amount

The amount of money donated (supports up to 10 digits, 2 decimal places).

date

The date when the payment record was created.

stripe_payment_intent

Unique identifier for the transaction in the Stripe system.

is_finished

Flag indicating whether the payment was successfully processed.

donations.services module

donations.services.create_checkout_session(announcement, amount)

Create a Stripe Checkout Session for a donation.

This service prepares the line items, currency (UAH), and metadata required for Stripe to process the payment and redirect the user back.

Parameters:

  • announcement (FundraisingAnnouncement) – The announcement object being funded.

  • amount (float) – The donation amount.

Returns:

The created Stripe session object containing the redirect URL.

Return type:

stripe.checkout.Session

donations.urls module

URL configuration for the donations application.

This module defines view routes for:

  • Stripe Webhook integration.

  • Payment success and cancellation pages.

  • Donation session creation and forms.

donations.views module

class donations.views.SuccessfulPaymentView(**kwargs)

Bases: View

View to display the success page after a completed transaction.

template_name = 'donations/successful_payment.html'
get(request)

Render the success template.

class donations.views.CanceledPaymentView(**kwargs)

Bases: View

View to display the cancellation page if the user aborts the payment.

template_name = 'donations/canceled_payment.html'
get(request)

Render the cancellation template.

class donations.views.SetPaymentView(**kwargs)

Bases: View

View to render the initial payment form for a specific announcement.

template_name = 'donations/set_payment.html'
get(request, *args, **kwargs)

Display the donation form.

Parameters:

announcement_id (int) – Passed via URL to identify the fundraising target.

class donations.views.CreateCheckoutSessionView(**kwargs)

Bases: View

View to handle the form submission and initiate the Stripe checkout process.

post(request, *args, **kwargs)

Process the donation amount and redirect to Stripe.

Extracts the amount from the POST data and calls the checkout service. In case of failure, logs the error and redirects to the canceled page.

donations.webhooks module

donations.webhooks.stripe_webhook_view(request)

Handle Stripe webhook events to process asynchronous payment updates.

This view verifies the Stripe signature, constructs the event, and if the payment is successful (checkout.session.completed), it creates a corresponding Payment record in the database.

Parameters:

request (HttpRequest) – The incoming POST request from Stripe.

Returns:

200 OK if processed, 400 Bad Request on verification failure.

Return type:

HttpResponse
